-- 1 of 3 --

Welcome to Advanced Influencer Marketing!
I’m Gretta van Riel and I’ve co-founded four multi-
million dollar ecommerce stores. One of my brands,
The 5th Watches, achieved $1 million dollars in
sales in a single day. I’ve also launched Influencer
Marketing platform called Hey Influencers which has
helped link thousands of social media influencers to
brands.
I’ve been in the ecommerce game since 2012 and
since then the biggest key to success across all
of my brands has been influencer marketing. So in
this module I’ve wrapped up the biggest lessons
I’ve learned when trying to scale my influencer
marketing strategies as my businesses have grown.
Specifically, I’ll teach you my proven methods to
boost conversions (above all else), increase your
following, and drive more traffic to your website.
